history.en: Descended from Fox Terriers and other European terrier breeds brought to Chile by immigrants in the 18th and 19th centuries. Developed as a distinct breed for hunting vermin on farms and estates, becoming Chile's first recognized native breed, though not yet recognized by major international kennel clubs.
